response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and a demonstrated passion for tooling and developer workflows, but his resume lacks explicit, recent, or deep involvement with Java/Kotlin, Spring, JVM internals, or enterprise IDE tooling — critical for this role. His DLang and Node.js focus, while impressive, doesn't align with the core technical requirements.
strengths: Proven experience building developer tooling and IDE-adjacent systems (e.g., test runners, code generators)
Strong track record in open-source contributions and technical education (workshops, talks)
Deep systems-level understanding across languages and platforms, including performance optimization
concerns: No clear evidence of recent Java/Kotlin or Spring ecosystem work in last 5+ years
Lack of demonstrated experience with IDE internals, build tool integration, or application server tooling
Primary tech stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, with Java mentioned only in early roles without depth
